nodes.title: Display Funds List
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId/funds page loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/funds and display funds in a table with columns: name, type (safe/bank/wallet/exchanger), linked account, balance. Supports filtering by fund type.

nodes.title: Create Fund
nodes.description: When user clicks 'إضافة صندوق' and fills form with {name, fundType, accountId, currencyId}, triggers POST /api/businesses/:bizId/funds. Success: closes form, refreshes list. Failure: shows validation errors.

nodes.title: Edit Fund
nodes.description: When user clicks edit icon on fund row, opens pre-filled form. When user saves, triggers PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/funds/:id. Success: refreshes list. Failure: shows error.

nodes.title: Delete Fund
nodes.description: When user clicks delete icon, shows confirmation dialog. On confirm, triggers DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/funds/:id. Success: removes from list. Cancel: closes dialog.
